howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: A smarter orientation experience in three steps

steps.title: Answer the orientation test
steps.desc: Complete a short and adaptive quiz that identifies your academic strengths and preferences.

steps.title: Receive AI insights
steps.desc: Our engine analyzes your profile and suggests fields, majors, and career paths that match you.

steps.title: Move forward with confidence
steps.desc: Use tailored recommendations, career resources, and next-step guidance to plan your future.

about.label: About Massarek
about.title: A platform built to empower academic decisions
about.description: Massarek brings together AI-powered guidance, career insights, and personalized recommendations to help students choose the right field with confidence. We focus on clarity, accuracy, and a delightful experience for every learner.
about.mission: Help students discover their strengths and turn them into a meaningful academic path, while removing uncertainty from career planning.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let’s answer your questions
contact.description: Reach out if you need help getting started, want to learn more about our tests, or want a demo of Massarek.

cta.readySubtitle: Join thousands of students who found their ideal academic field with Massarek.

hero.headline: AI-powered student orientation for clearer academic decisions.
hero.subtitle: Massarek helps students discover the best academic and career path using intelligent recommendations, in-depth insights, and a simple platform designed for the next generation of learners.

insight.label: Project insight
insight.title: Crafted to remove uncertainty and bring clarity to student orientation.
insight.description: Designed with modern students in mind, Massarek combines AI analysis with easy-to-read career intelligence so learners can choose their future with confidence.

cardA.title: Smart guidance
cardA.description: Focused recommendations for every student journey.

cardB.title: Data-driven clarity
cardB.description: Insights based on tests, interests, and academic goals.

sections.title: Project Idea
sections.description: Massarek is an AI-powered platform that helps students find the best academic and career paths based on their skills, interests, and test results. It brings meaningful guidance into the orientation process using modern intelligence.

sections.title: Why We Built This
sections.description: Many students struggle to choose the right academic path due to lack of guidance and clear information. Massarek was created to bridge that gap and provide intelligent, data-driven support for academic decision-making.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.description: To help students make smarter decisions using intelligent AI recommendations. We empower learners to choose the academic path that truly aligns with their strengths and aspirations.

items.title: Personalized orientation
items.description: Tailored guidance based on your unique skills, interests, and test results.

items.title: AI-powered recommendations
items.description: Intelligent suggestions that match you with the best academic fields and career paths.

items.title: Better decision-making
items.description: Clear, data-driven insights to help you choose with confidence and clarity.

items.title: Easy access to career information
items.description: Fast, comprehensive access to details about majors, careers, and future opportunities.

team.label: Team
team.headline: Created by students, built for students
team.description: Massarek was developed by a focused team of student-oriented engineers who care about accessibility, transparency, and helping learners choose the right academic journey.

careers.title: Software Engineer

careers.title: UX Designer
careers.desc: Create intuitive and engaging user experiences for digital products.

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Powered by AI
chatbot.initialMessage: Hi! I'm your AI orientation assistant. 🎓 I can help you explore career paths, understand your test results, or answer any questions about academic fields. What would you like to know?
chatbot.responseMessage: That's a great question! Based on your profile and test results, I'd recommend exploring fields that combine your analytical skills with your creative interests. Would you like me to go into more detail about specific programs?
chatbot.inputPlaceholder: Ask about careers, fields, or your results...

recommendations.title: AI Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Based on your test results and profile, here are your top matches.

test.completedDescription: Your answers have been analyzed by our AI. Check your personalized recommendations now.
